mapper.select: SELECT CODE_NO, DESCRIPTION, DEPTH, PARENT_CODE_NO, OPERATION_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, REMARK, GROUP_CODE, CODE_ID FROM SY_CODE WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY GROUP_CODE, ORDERNO, CODE_NO

SELECT CODE_NO, DESCRIPTION, DEPTH, PARENT_CODE_NO, OPERATION_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, REMARK, GROUP_CODE, CODE_ID FROM SY_CODE WHERE CODE_NO = #{codeNo}

SELECT CODE_NO, DESCRIPTION, DEPTH, PARENT_CODE_NO, OPERATION_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, REMARK, GROUP_CODE, CODE_ID FROM SY_CODE WHERE GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode} ORDER BY ORDERNO, CODE_NO

SELECT CODE_NO, DESCRIPTION, DEPTH, PARENT_CODE_NO, OPERATION_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, REMARK, GROUP_CODE, CODE_ID FROM SY_CODE WHERE PARENT_CODE_NO = #{parentCodeNo} ORDER BY ORDERNO, CODE_NO

SELECT CODE_NO, DESCRIPTION, DEPTH, PARENT_CODE_NO, OPERATION_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, REMARK, GROUP_CODE, CODE_ID FROM SY_CODE WHERE (PARENT_CODE_NO IS NULL OR PARENT_CODE_NO = '') ORDER BY GROUP_CODE, ORDERNO, CODE_NO

WITH CODE_TREE AS ( SELECT CODE_NO, DESCRIPTION, DEPTH, PARENT_CODE_NO, OPERATION_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, REMARK, GROUP_CODE, CODE_ID FROM SY_CODE WHERE CODE_NO = #{rootCodeNo} UNION ALL SELECT c.CODE_NO, c.DESCRIPTION, c.DEPTH, c.PARENT_CODE_NO, c.OPERATION_ID, c.CREATE_DATE, c.CREATED_BY, c.UPDATE_DATE, c.UPDATED_BY, c.ORDERNO, c.ACTIVITY, c.REMARK, c.GROUP_CODE, c.CODE_ID FROM SY_CODE c INNER JOIN CODE_TREE ct ON c.PARENT_CODE_NO = ct.CODE_NO WHERE c.ACTIVITY = 1 ) SELECT CODE_NO, DESCRIPTION, DEPTH, PARENT_CODE_NO, OPERATION_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, REMARK, GROUP_CODE, CODE_ID FROM CODE_TREE ORDER BY DEPTH, ORDERNO, CODE_NO

SELECT CODE_NO, DESCRIPTION, DEPTH, PARENT_CODE_NO, OPERATION_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, REMARK, GROUP_CODE, CODE_ID FROM SY_CODE WHERE DEPTH = #{depth} ORDER BY GROUP_CODE, ORDERNO, CODE_NO

SELECT CODE_NO, DESCRIPTION, DEPTH, PARENT_CODE_NO, OPERATION_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, REMARK, GROUP_CODE, CODE_ID FROM SY_CODE WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY GROUP_CODE, ORDERNO, CODE_NO
mapper.update: UPDATE SY_CODE SET DESCRIPTION = #{description}, DEPTH = #{depth}, PARENT_CODE_NO = #{parentCodeNo}, OPERATION_ID = #{operationId}, UPDATE_DATE = sysdate, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORDERNO = #{orderNo}, ACTIVITY = #{activity}, REMARK = #{remark}, GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode}, CODE_ID = #{codeId} WHERE CODE_NO = #{codeNo}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT GROUP_CODE FROM SY_CODE WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 AND GROUP_CODE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY GROUP_CODE

SELECT CODE_NO, DESCRIPTION, DEPTH, PARENT_CODE_NO, OPERATION_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, REMARK, GROUP_CODE, CODE_ID FROM SY_CODE WHERE ACTIVITY = #{activity} AND GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode} ORDER BY ORDERNO, CODE_NO

when.test: parentCodeNo == null or parentCodeNo == '' or parentCodeNo == 'ALL'

choose.when: SELECT c.CODE_NO, c.DESCRIPTION, c.DEPTH, c.PARENT_CODE_NO, c.OPERATION_ID, c.ORDERNO, gv.CONTENT AS CODE_NAME, gvi.CONTENT AS NAME_VI, gve.CONTENT AS NAME_EN, gvz.CONTENT AS NAME_ZH, gvk.CONTENT AS NAME_KO FROM ( SELECT sc.CODE_NO, sc.DESCRIPTION, sc.DEPTH, sc.PARENT_CODE_NO, sc.OPERATION_ID, sc.ORDERNO FROM SY_CODE sc START WITH sc.PARENT_CODE_NO = '0' AND sc.ACTIVITY = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SY_CODE_PARAM p WHERE p.CODE_NO = sc.CODE_NO AND p.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) CONNECT BY PRIOR sc.CODE_NO = sc.PARENT_CODE_NO AND sc.ACTIVITY = 1 ) c LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gv ON c.CODE_NO = gv.NO AND gv.LANGUAGE = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON c.CODE_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gve ON c.CODE_NO = gve.NO AND gve.LANGUAGE = 'en' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvz ON c.CODE_NO = gvz.NO AND gvz.LANGUAGE = 'zh' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvk ON c.CODE_NO = gvk.NO AND gvk.LANGUAGE = 'ko' ORDER BY c.ORDERNO, c.CODE_NO
choose.otherwise:
SELECT c.CODE_NO, c.DESCRIPTION, c.DEPTH, c.PARENT_CODE_NO, c.OPERATION_ID, c.ORDERNO, gv.CONTENT AS CODE_NAME, gvi.CONTENT AS NAME_VI, gve.CONTENT AS NAME_EN, gvz.CONTENT AS NAME_ZH, gvk.CONTENT AS NAME_KO FROM SY_CODE c LEFT JOIN SY_CODE_PARAM SCP ON c.CODE_NO = scp.CODE_NO AND scp.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gv ON c.CODE_NO = gv.NO AND gv.LANGUAGE = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON c.CODE_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gve ON c.CODE_NO = gve.NO AND gve.LANGUAGE = 'en' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvz ON c.CODE_NO = gvz.NO AND gvz.LANGUAGE = 'zh' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvk ON c.CODE_NO = gvk.NO AND gvk.LANGUAGE = 'ko' WHERE c.ACTIVITY = 1
AND c.PARENT_CODE_NO = '0'
AND c.PARENT_CODE_NO = #{parentCodeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY c.ORDERNO, c.CODE_NO

mapper.select:
SELECT c.CODE_NO, c.DESCRIPTION, c.DEPTH, c.PARENT_CODE_NO, c.OPERATION_ID, c.ORDERNO, gv.CONTENT AS CODE_NAME, gvi.CONTENT AS NAME_VI, gve.CONTENT AS NAME_EN, gvz.CONTENT AS NAME_ZH, gvk.CONTENT AS NAME_KO FROM SY_CODE c JOIN SY_CODE_PARAM SCP ON c.CODE_NO = scp.CODE_NO AND scp.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gv ON c.CODE_NO = gv.NO AND gv.LANGUAGE = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON c.CODE_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gve ON c.CODE_NO = gve.NO AND gve.LANGUAGE = 'en' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvz ON c.CODE_NO = gvz.NO AND gvz.LANGUAGE = 'zh' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvk ON c.CODE_NO = gvk.NO AND gvk.LANGUAGE = 'ko' WHERE c.ACTIVITY = 1
AND c.PARENT_CODE_NO = '0'
AND c.PARENT_CODE_NO = #{parentCodeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY c.ORDERNO, c.CODE_NO

SELECT c.CODE_NO, c.DESCRIPTION, c.DEPTH, c.PARENT_CODE_NO, c.OPERATION_ID, c.ORDERNO, gv.CONTENT AS CODE_NAME, gvi.CONTENT AS NAME_VI, gve.CONTENT AS NAME_EN, gvz.CONTENT AS NAME_ZH, gvk.CONTENT AS NAME_KO FROM SY_CODE c LEFT JOIN SY_CODE_PARAM SCP ON c.CODE_NO = scp.CODE_NO AND scp.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gv ON c.CODE_NO = gv.NO AND gv.LANGUAGE = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON c.CODE_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gve ON c.CODE_NO = gve.NO AND gve.LANGUAGE = 'en' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvz ON c.CODE_NO = gvz.NO AND gvz.LANGUAGE = 'zh' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvk ON c.CODE_NO = gvk.NO AND gvk.LANGUAGE = 'ko' WHERE c.ACTIVITY = 1 AND ( c.CODE_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gv.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gvi.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gve.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gvz.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gvk.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) ORDER BY c.ORDERNO, c.CODE_NO
